## 💡 Feature Description
Describe the feature you want...

## ✅ Motivation
Why would this feature be useful? Who would benefit?

Any ideas on how to implement this?

## 📋 Alternatives
Any alternative solutions you've considered?

## 🔍 Additional Context
Screenshots, examples, or references?
